collection_hero.title: Clean Beauty for Dogs
collection_hero.subtitle: For people who care about their dog's beauty routine as much as their own

products.name: the discovery pack
products.description: Includes one vessel of each scent: oat + cactus flower, so you can try both and find your favorite.

products.name: dry shampoo - Cactus Flower
products.description: A non-aerosol dry shampoo powder that absorbs excess oils, neutralizes odors, and keeps your dog's coat fresh between wash days in the cactus flower scent.

products.name: dry shampoo - Oat
products.description: A non-aerosol dry shampoo powder that absorbs excess oils, neutralizes odors, and keeps your dog's coat fresh between wash days in the oat scent.

products.name: dry shampoo on-the-go - Cactus Flower
products.description: Lil Luv Dog's on-the-go dry shampoo format for quick refreshes between wash days, finished in the cactus flower scent.

products.name: dry shampoo on-the-go - Oat
products.description: Lil Luv Dog's on-the-go dry shampoo format for quick refreshes between wash days, finished in the oat scent.

products.name: the ultimate pack
products.description: The complete Lil Luv Dog experience with every dry powder shampoo style in both signature scents for home and on-the-go routines.

products.name: home + go pack - Oat
products.description: Includes a full-size pup dry shampoo and a pack of 10 dry shampoo sachets in the oat scent for the busiest pet parents.

products.name: home + go pack - Cactus Flower
products.description: Includes a full-size pup dry shampoo and a pack of 10 dry shampoo sachets in the cactus flower scent for the busiest pet parents.

products.name: the bandana
products.description: A modern take on a classic: 100% cotton and 100% chance of compliments.
